feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cannot release transport request in ABAP Cloud Project although I only receive ATC warnings
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I cannot release my transport request in ABAP Cloud Project although I only receive ATC warnings. Documentation says, that only errors have to be solved.

Does anyone know, what I must do to get my transport request released?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Creating a popup with depending fields
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I need to develop a Popup for a Fiori APP/serivce via REST in BTP, with two fields. Both fields need a value help or drop down list. The possible values list of field 2 are depending on the entered value in field 1. Both fields are mandatory, so I must garantee that either the field 2 can be maintained only if a value in field 1 is given or I need to display a messasge to inform the user that he has to maintain field 1 first. 

Regarding the message, I already created a Question - unfortunately without a usefull answer.

Display a message from Custom Entity / Query Imple... - SAP Community

Does anyone know, how to solve this basic reuqirement?

Thanks, Sebastian

entry.title: CDS for Picking Process in Outbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hello, I successfully created an Outbound Delivery using I_OutboundDeliveryTP and EML with ABAP RAP. However, to Post GI for this delivery I couldn't find a way to update picking quantity for items in my outbound delivery. 

How can I do that in ABAP Cloud Private Edition? I attempted to modify the field PickQuantityInOrderUnit of the entity OutboundDeliveryItem, but I get an error that this field is read-only. Moreover, trying to create items of I_OutboundDeliveryTP using _Item association with PickQuantityInOrderUnit set resulted in the same error.

entry.title: RAP - Use of /SAPSLL/CL_PRCLS_API
entry.content:
Hi

I'm trying to use /SAPSLL/CL_PRCLS_API to classify/re-classify products as per note 2458080. 

The class is using BOBF framework, and the save methods are using commits, which is illegal. Therefore I have implemented the cl_abap_behavior_saver to do the save logic. But no luck.
I could create a RFC and call using "Destination "NONE"". But absolutely not the recommended way.

What could I do, to keep the code up-to-date?

entry.title: SAP RAP: BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I need your help with one thing. 

I am currently implementing a “managed” RAP Fiori application and have encountered the following error in the course of my implementation:

 

Runtime Errors: BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT

Statement "CALL FUNCTION IN UPDATE TASK" is not allowed with this status.

The statements
- CALL FUNCTION IN UPDATE TASK
- CALL FUNCTION IN BACKGROUND TASK/UNIT
- PERFORM ON COMMIT/ROLLBACK
are not allowed outside of the "Save" method.


I don't have much experience in integrating existing SAP ABAP classes into my RAP application, as I have only been performing operations using EML. In this case and also in future transactions I will not always be able to avoid developing everything greenfield, so I have to use existing code.

Stupid question, but can someone explain the error to me exactly?
It seems that I can't write anything to the database outside of the “Save” method. Which can't always be avoided, especially if I use standard code.

How can this be prevented in the future? Do RAP applications then have to be implemented exclusively “unmanaged”? We haven't had much experience with this yet.

Many thanks for your help

regards,

Lars

entry.title: Error while pulling Branch to Test System in Abap Environment on BTP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

While pulling a branch of a software component to Test system, I got errors "Type /.../CX_RUNTIME is unknown".

In my eclipse ABAP Cloud Project everything is fine and the object exists. In the transport request, there is just one entry for the object /.../CX_RUNTIME (Type APIS). I changed the release state to C1. The class itself is not in the TR. 

I created another TR an put the class /.../CX_RUNTIME itself in, released it and pulled the branch again. I got the same errors.

Does anyone of you know, how to fix this problem?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Edit button in business configuration app is disabled
entry.content:
Hi ,

I created business configuration for one of my table in the BTP environment using the following steps.

- https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-configuration-object.html

- https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-authorization-control.html

But somehow the edit button in the business configuration app is still disabled.

entry.title: How to change value help dialog table from grid table to responsive table?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

is there an annotation to change the table type of a value help dialog in fiori elements from grid to responsive table via frontend annotation or better via abap cds annotation?  

Regards

Alex

entry.title: Strange RAP runtime behavior during validation on save
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am noticing a very strange behavior in my RAP application (Managed)

As per SAP help documentation - AUTHORITY-CHECK statement cannot be used in VALIDATION ON SAVE.

But I used AUTHORITY-CHECK statement in handler method of VALIDATION ON SAVE to validate user authorization, and not getting any error/behavior illegal statement exception.

Note:- There is not any authorization context is defined to disable authorization.

Do you know the reason, or is SAP help documentation not updated correctly?

entry.title: CDS Data Model for Analytical List Page
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am trying to develop the Analytical List Page. I created CDS Data Model with Analytics annotations and I am exposing it via Odata V2 Service Binding. Unfortunately, as long as I keep the annotation @analytics.query: true in my C-View, I am getting an error in App preview: Fetch API (direct DB access) is not supported for entity

Unfortunately, exposing my C-View directly using @odata.publish: true as suggested in this blog is not an option, as our ABAP Language Version is ABAP for Cloud Development, this is not allowed.

Is there a way around this?

Best regards,
Radek

entry.title: Custom entity on public cloud RAP
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I created a CDS based on a custom entity in SAP RAP cloud. I added a new button to this CDS. This button will perform an action on all records displayed on the screen. However, in the class I defined in the behavior, I cannot read the data on the screen. How can I do it?

entry.title: how to read fields of structures
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

inside a custom report, I need to read some fields that are present in these structures:

 

AFVGD
AFRUD
CAUFVD
VIQMFE
RIWO00
VIQMUR

 

since they are structures, I can't do a Select, are there tables that I can use that are connected to these structures? Or are there Function Modules?


Thank you!

entry.title: Triggering an Error Message leads to Warning Message in RAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to to display an error message in my Fiori App, but instead a warning message is displayed with the option to continue processing.

Creating the Message 

 

APPEND VALUE #( %tky = run-%tky ) TO failed-run.
APPEND VALUE #( %tky = run-%tky
                %msg = new_message( id       = 'ZM_RUN'
                                    number   = 001
                                    severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-error ) TO reported-run.

 

 A Warning is displayed

Does anyone of you, know why this happends and how to solve this issue?

Note: The process is started via a Button "transform Product" on an Object Page in display mode.

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: How to test ABAP RAP V4 service custom/instance Actions using Postman or SAP Gateway
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Please help me point to location or documentations to test custom Actions created in ABAP RAP V4 Service.

Thanks-

entry.title: Translation of a Drop Down List Box in Fiori App in BTP REST Scenario
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I'm trying to use a DDLB as a value help in a Fiori App. I only want to display the language dependend text of the value help. The problem is, that the DDLB lists the values in all available languages and not only in the logon language of the user.

Here is my implementation

Domain with fixed values, translated with the maintain translations app of the ABAP Environment

CDS View for thhe Domain

 

View is associated to my root view

Does anyone know how to solve this issue or is there any other approach?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: No authorization to access service group, You do not have start authorization for R3TR G4BA
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am developing an ABAP Restful Application with a single database table as source. It is a training application, there should be no problem showing you the list of elements I have created using the ABAP RESTful wizard:

When I publish the service binding (OData V4 - UI) and I want to Preview, a browser page appears but I am not able to press the Go neither Create buttons because of the following error:

I deleted the strict ( 2 ); sentence in the behavior definition but that did not help. Note that service definition and service binding has different names because wizard required to use different names. Have you experienced some error like these before?

entry.title: Post Goods Issue ABAP RAP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am using ABAP Cloud Private Edition with SAPUI5 and ABAP RAP. I managed to create sales order via I_SalesOrderTP and then outbound delivery with I_OutboundDeliveryTP.

However, I am not able to post goods issue for this process, which I've been trying to do using I_MaterialDocumentTP:

This resulted in an error: Update control of movement type is incorrect (entry 601 X X)

What is the proper way to Post GI after creating outbound delivery? Item category has picking not required, so that would not be the problem here.

MODIFY ENTITIES OF I_MaterialDocumentTP

ENTITY MaterialDocument

CREATE FROM VALUE #( ( %cid = s_receipt_number

GoodsMovementCode = '06'

PostingDate = outbound_delivery-DeliveryDate

DocumentDate = outbound_delivery-DeliveryDate

%control-GoodsMovementCode = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-PostingDate = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-DocumentDate = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed ) )

 

ENTITY MaterialDocument

CREATE BY \_MaterialDocumentItem

FROM VALUE #( (

%cid_ref = s_receipt_number

%target = VALUE #( FOR item IN outbound_delivery_item (

%cid = item-OutboundDeliveryItem

plant = item-Plant

material = item-Material

GoodsMovementType = '601'

storagelocation = item-StorageLocation

QuantityInEntryUnit = item-ActualDeliveredQtyInOrderUnit

EntryUnit = item-OrderQuantityUnit

%control-plant = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-material = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-GoodsMovementType = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-storagelocation = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-QuantityInEntryUnit = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-entryunit = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

) ) ) )

MAPPED DATA(ls_mapped)

FAILED DATA(ls_failed)

REPORTED DATA(ls_reported).

 

Thank you for your time, Jakub

entry.title: Enter does not work when I deploy my RAP app in Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the issue when Enter does not work when I deploy my RAP app in Fiori Launchpad.

When I preview from the service binding preview option, the enter button refreshes the content of my Facet. But when I deploy my app in Fiori Launchpad and view it, the enter button is not reacting. It does not do the refresh when I press enter.

Am I missing something here?

Thank you

entry.title: How to download XML file to computer on RAP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I want to download an xml type file locally behind the createxml button in my rap application. Has anyone developed such an application before?

Actually, I want to adapt the code in the on-primes to the RAP, what can I do?

entry.title: ABAP RAP Unmanaged API not Triggering SAVE method
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I have created V4 API using Unmanaged RAP Scenario... When I am trying to create record using API in Gateway test tool, records are getting creating in Draft mode and they are not getting Saved. SAVE method is not getting triggered... I have Implemented Early Numbering which is getting triggered along with Create Method...

Everything is working fine when I using testing same service using Preview Option in Eclipse.

Please help what am I missing...

Early Numbering code

METHOD earlynumbering_create.

    DATA: l_tanum         TYPE /scwm/tanum,
          l_returncode(1) TYPE c.
    CALL FUNCTION 'NUMBER_GET_NEXT'
      EXPORTING
        nr_range_nr        = '01'
        object             = wmegc_nrobj_to
        subobject          = 'WD01'
      IMPORTING
        number             = l_tanum
        returncode         = l_returncode
      EXCEPTIONS
        interval_not_found = 1.
    LOOP AT entities ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_entities>).
      l_tanum = l_tanum + 1.
      mapped-warehousetask  =   VALUE #(
        FOR ls_entities IN entities WHERE ( tanum is INITIAL )
        (
            %cid    = ls_entities-%cid
            %is_draft   =   ls_entities-%is_draft
            tanum   =   l_tanum
        )
      ).
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDMETHOD.

Behavior Definition

unmanaged implementation in class zbp_i_openwt unique;
strict;
with draft;
define behavior for ZI_OPENWT alias WarehouseTask
draft table Zordim_o_d
//late numbering
early numbering
lock master
total etag ChangeAt
authorization master ( global )
etag master ChangeAt
{
  create;
  update;
  delete;
  field ( readonly ) Tanum;
  field ( readonly ) CreatedBy;
  field ( readonly ) Letyp;
  field ( readonly ) CreatedAt;
  draft action Edit;
  draft action Activate;
  draft action Discard;
  draft action Resume;
  draft determine action Prepare;
  mapping for /scwm/ordim_o {
    Lgnum   =   lgnum;
    Tanum   =   tanum;
    Letyp   = letyp;
    Procty  = procty;
    Tostat  =   tostat;
    Vlenr   =   vlenr;
    ChangeAt    =   changed_at;
    CreatedAt   =   created_at;
    CreatedBy   =   created_by;
  }
}

CREATE method

  METHOD create.
    DATA: lo_entity_store TYPE REF TO zcl_datastore_rap,
          ls_entity       TYPE /scwm/s_ordim_o_rf.
    lo_entity_store = zcl_datastore_rap=>get_object(  ).
    LOOP AT entities ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_owt>).
      ls_entity-vlenr_o   = <lfs_owt>-vlenr.
      ls_entity-nlpla_o   = <lfs_owt>-nlpla.
      INSERT VALUE #( %cid = <lfs_owt>-%cid ) INTO TABLE mapped-warehousetask.
    ENDLOOP.
    lo_entity_store->put_data( data_in = ls_entity ).
  ENDMETHOD.

Please help.

Thanks-
